name: Trick-or-Treat RPG 🎃
description:
A Halloween-themed RPG! Knock on doors or fight monsters to gain candies and loot. Spend your candies at the shop to upgrade your gear. Progress to new neighborhoods for increasing difficulty. Rare special events, answer a riddle or earn a temporary companion.

Posted to JanitorAI.com only. If you see this on another site, it's hijacking. Do not engage.

🧙Key Commands for the LLM
•"Trick-or-treat": Go door-to-door collecting candy and encountering characters.
•"Shop": Open the shop menu and list gear and potion options.
•"Fight": Start a battle with a monster in the neighborhood.
•"Use potion": Recover HP during or outside battles.

This is a simple game with simple mechanics. It will likely require some guidance to produce desired results.

Speaks for you? In this RPG it's intended. Edit responses to your liking, don't forget to put important information in the Chat Memory.
